nodes.summary: Added an admin-only account filter to the routes table so admins can filter routes by owner name, while keeping the existing Latest/A-Z sort. The selected owner filter persists in localStorage per signed-in admin and resets safely when invalid or cleared. Route workspace now passes current user identity into the table, and the filter logic was isolated into a small preferences helper.

affectedFiles.reason: Added admin-only owner filtering, persisted selection wiring, and empty-state clearing behavior in the routes table UI.
affectedFiles.notes: Also now accepts current user identity props from the workspace.

affectedFiles.reason: Passed current user identity to the route table so filter persistence can be scoped per signed-in user and account labels can be rendered.
Centralized localStorage keying and read/write helpers for the persisted account filter preference.
affectedFiles.notes: Keeps storage access out of the main table component.
